Jay DeGooyer, Limited Scope Attorney, for Kevin Walsh, who is present.

Settlement conference held. Case settled. Settlement terms are as stated in the settlement agreement, which was not filed with the court for premises located at 910-924 Geary Street, #19 San Francisco, CA 94109. Trial date of 2/2/09 is vacated.
